summary: Freeform text summary of the problems with the inefficiencies or failure modes in the trace: The system repeatedly re-checked the same failed candidate set and kept proposing next steps without resolving the blocker, showing step repetition and unawareness of termination conditions; it also performed only snippet-level/incomplete verification and ultimately terminated due to max resets without completing the requested compound/enzyme identification task (e.g., repeated ε-caprolactone analysis, inability to verify enzyme transformations, and final “Workflow terminated due to reaching maximum reset count”).
